DispatchCondition.Title: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Any in excess of those required may be inoperative or removed provided:

ListItem.Para: Inoperative PBE remains in a certified location until removed from the aircraft at the next suitable maintenance facility.
Location placarding is removed or obscured.

Note.Para: Inoperative PBEs, removed from a certified location, or removed from the aircraft, are subject to angerous goods regulations.

DispatchCondition.Title: Applicable to: VN-A865, VN-A866, VN-A869, VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Any in excess of those required may be inoperative or removed provided:

ListItem.Para: Inoperative PBE remains in a certified location until removed from the aircraft at the next suitable maintenance facility.
Location placarding is removed or obscured.

Note.Para: Inoperative PBEs, removed from a certified location, or removed from the aircraft, are subject to dangerous goods regulations.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative, damaged, or missing provided proper installation and operation is verified at each preflight.

OperationProcedure.Para: Verify the associated portable protective breathing equipment (PBE) is properly installed and operates correctly before each flight.
